title: field-impact-analyzer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the field-impact-analyzer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

field_name.description: Example from AGENT.md: `Industry` (or `Industry__c` for custom) Required column: 'yes'.

repo_path.description: Example from AGENT.md: path to the sfdx project root; default `force-app/main/default` Required column: 'no'.
repo_path.example: path to the sfdx project root; default `force-app/main/default`

intent.description: Example from AGENT.md: `rename` / `delete` / `audit` — changes severity thresholds Required column: 'no'.
